title: Portolan Record Extension
description: Namespaced (portolan:) properties added to an OGC API - Records record or STAC item to describe cloud-native access and provenance. All optional; additionalProperties is true so the host record/item is unaffected.

portolan:iceberg_endpoint.description: Apache Iceberg REST catalog endpoint to ATTACH (static, anonymous).

portolan:iceberg_table.description: Fully-qualified table within the catalog, as namespace.table (e.g. v2.hsy_zoning).

portolan:access.description: Primary recommended access method for this distribution.

portolan:source_repo.description: The git repository that is the source of truth for this catalog/dataset.

portolan:provenance.description: Lineage: where the data came from and how it was processed.
